definition: contracted for μὴ οὖν, used like μή, in questions to which a negative answer is expected, but surely not? is it so?  Lat. num? μῶν ἐστι . . ; Answ. οὐ δῆτα, (Euripides): sometimes it asks doubtingly like Lat. num forte? and answered in the affirmative, (Euripides): —; μῶν οὐ . . ; requires an affirmative answer, Lat. nonne ? [variant datesTragica Adespota (ML)
